title: Zerotekz's Elytras
description: Adds custom Elytras to MC! (Custom Item Textures)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22d2378a4eddbd2dcce807ac68fa9f91152f28c0.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bQK3K-XSoqU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 - compatible & tested for 1.16 - 1.20.1!
 - should work for all upcoming Minecraft versions since texturepack format doesnt change!
 - needs [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT-Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn) to work!
 - if u need help join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/CdawEAH4va)!
 - for more infos visit my [Website](https://www.zerotekz.net/)!

This pack includes unique Elytras! 
You get them by **renaming** your elytra in an **anvil** to the designated name in the **nameslist**!  

New:

![White Dragon Wings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79effc7d07dd291f24d8d391055b03b32719001d.png)

![Ripped Cape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ae0e3d6e0abb03a75efe49ec680b7478e506aec.png)

Added Icons!
![Added Icons!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c5e51ea654c44e86cdac4d3957a2e8e3316b3d1.png)

<details>
<summary>Nameslist!</summary>

New:
 - White Dragon Wings
 - Ripped Cape

Old:
 - Angel Elytra
 - Lesser Demon Elytra
 - Red Demon Elytra
 - Blue Demon Elytra
 - True Demon Elytra


 - White Wings
 - Dark Wings
 - Blue Wings
 - Yellow Wings
 - Guardian Elytra


 - Leaf Elytra
 - Maple Elytra
 - Red Maple Elytra
 - Yellow Maple Elytra
 - Insect Elytra


 - Red Dragon Elytra
 - Green Dragon Elytra
 - Jet Elytra
 - Royal Elytra
 - Elytra (Basic Elytra)

</details>
